Louis Vuitton thick-soled loafers, the latest couple's derby shoes, are very popular this year. They provide a stylish and trendy look when worn. The LV Remix derby shoes are inspired by classic hiking boots, reimagined with a fashionable and avant-garde silhouette. The shoes feature thick laces and hooks with letter patterns, details taken from Louis Vuitton leather goods, including a canvas key ring and a natural leather label with yellow stitching. Made of calf leather with sheepskin lining and a thick rubber outsole. Heel height: 5cm. Available in sizes 35-45 (custom sizes 46-47 are non-returnable).

Louis Vuitton LV brand new Lagoon sports casual shoes, canvas shoes with classic design infused with a retro vibe. Leather trim showcases the Louis Vuitton logo, embossed eyelets, piping, and laces for a refined look. Made with original imported canvas for the upper, leather insole, and imported canvas lining. Original molded TPU outsole. Sizes available: #35-41 (Custom sizes 40, 41 are non-returnable).

I was immediately drawn to the Birkenstock x Lv collaboration couple's collection when it was released. It was quite a challenge to find a personal shopper to purchase it, but I finally got my hands on a pair. They are truly stunning and hard to come by. I highly recommend them to my friends. Sizes available: #35-45 (Women's 40, Men's 45, custom orders are non-returnable).

Louis Vuitton Sneakerina ballet sneakers from the spring/summer collection, featuring smooth lines crafted from silky suede leather, combining the lightness of ballet shoes with the comfort of sneakers. Details include LV logo on the side and Monogram canvas heel tab. Enhanced with Sacchetto construction and TPU outsole for a soft wearing experience. Sole thickness: 1.5CM. Material: Imported top layer cowhide. Lining: Custom breathable mesh. Sole: Custom molded TPU. Sizes available: #35-42 (Custom sizes 40, 41, 42 are non-returnable).

LV Run Away Maxi series, featuring the iconic design of the Run Away sneakers, is now available for purchase. Made with smooth cowhide leather, highlighted with contrasting LV letters and Vuitton logo, and a lightweight rubber sole with a wedge heel inspired by running shoe construction. Material: Imported top layer cowhide. Lining: Custom breathable mesh lining. Sole: Original TPU combination sole. Sole thickness: 3.5CM. Sizes available: Women's 35-40, Men's 39-44.

LV Louis Vuitton Donkey Brand 24 Autumn/Winter CHECKER series thick-soled short boots, Martin boots, ankle boots, couple boots, top-grade airplane box version. LV Checker ankle boots shine at the Louis Vuitton 2024 Spring/Summer show, interpreting diverse styles with smooth cowhide leather. The shoe is embellished with embossed metal studs and Vuitton shoelace decorations, a must-have for fashionistas. Thick-soled for added height, available in sizes 35-41 for women and 39-46 for men.
